nodes.name: Deep-Dive-Drivers.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script for in-depth driver health analysis on Windows. Checks for PnP devices with errors, driver service failures in the system event log, recently changed/installed drivers, third-party kernel modules, and WHQL signature status. Accepts -DaysBack parameter.

nodes.name: Preserve-Dumps.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that preserves Windows memory dump files by copying them to a designated safe location before they are overwritten. Ensures crash dump evidence is retained for later analysis.

nodes.name: Triage-Crash.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that automates Windows crash triage. Reads recent BSOD stop codes from the event log, analyzes minidump metadata, cross-references with the driver watchlist, and produces a structured triage report.
